## [06:04 - 09:05]

And what's the one technique guaranteed to help you fall asleep within 10 minutes anytime, anywhere? And great hooks are oftentimes multi dimensional. They don't just use one of these factors. They use several of them all in the same hook. Now, it's important to know that hooks are not the same as the transformation that you offer.
